transcript:
CALLER: Good evening. My name is Lalita Rao and I need a refill of my blood pressure medication. It's been prescribed by Dr. Anjali Verma here.
AGENT: Good evening, Ms. Rao. Let me look up your file. Could you confirm your date of birth?
CALLER: 7th September 1958.
AGENT: Got it. I see Dr. Verma prescribed Amlodipine 5mg and Telmisartan 40mg. Is that correct?
CALLER: Yes, both of those. I'm almost out and my next appointment isn't for another 3 weeks.
AGENT: Understood. I'll send a refill request to Dr. Verma's desk right now with a note about your timeline. She typically approves these within a business day. Would you like to collect from our pharmacy or shall we arrange delivery?
CALLER: I'll collect it myself, I live nearby.
AGENT: Perfect. You'll receive an SMS once Dr. Verma approves — usually by tomorrow afternoon. Is there anything else?
CALLER: No, that's fine. Thank you dear.
AGENT: Take care and stay healthy, Ms. Rao!
